profile.personality: A gouty, sluggish constitution prone to irritability and sentimentality, with a deep connection between emotional states and digestive disturbance. These individuals are often hysterical, excitable young women or worn-down gouty types who are exquisitely sensitive to environmental conditions—weather, temperature, light, and dietary indiscretions.
profile.mental_state: Marked by a loathing of life and a desire to die, indicating deep-seated constitutional disturbance rather than superficial despair. The mind is easily overwhelmed; every complaint reverberates through the stomach, and mental exertion or sensory input (fire, light, heat) aggravates the whole system. There is an absence of restlessness or anxiety, distinguishing this from Arsenicum—the patient is weary and burdened rather than fearful.
profile.emotional_pattern: Prone to sentimental, ecstatic, hysterical outbursts—the classic 'sentimental mood in the moonlight'—reflecting a disordered nervous system and unbalanced affections. Suffers from unrequited love, dreamy romanticism, and emotional excess that alternates with exhaustion and complete withdrawal. The emotional life is chaotic and overwhelming, swinging between maudlin sensitivity and a flat, life-rejecting apathy.

rubric_passages.Chest: The chest remains sore, lame and bruised from the violence of the cough.
rubric_passages.Chill: If he becomes slightly overheated he fairly boils with perspiration and then takes cold.
rubric_passages.Extremities: all the pains and aches of the body are worse from sour wine; headaches come from this cause and the gastric disturbances are greatly aggravated from sour wine.
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness: the gouty symptoms come back into the extremities.
rubric_passages.Generalities: You will be surprised, when studying full provings of this substance, to notice that all the symptoms seem to centre about the stomach; it does not matter much what kind of complaints he suffers from the stomach takes part in it.
rubric_passages.Head: He often has an attack of sick headache and it will be called by the family a gastric sick headache, but the condition just mentioned comes on from taking cold, which slacks up the thick discharge into a dryness of the nose and the inhaled air burns the nose like fire.
rubric_passages.Mind: It produces a very serious state in the mind, an absence of the desire to live. It is well known to physicians that the case is a serious one if the patient has no desire to live; life is a burden.
rubric_passages.Mind, irritability: Every thing seems to disturb him. He has loathing of food; the thought and smell of food disturb him.
rubric_passages.Mouth: The whole tongue is covered with a milk-white coating. This you find in all diseases where the remedy is indicated.
rubric_passages.Rectum: Inflammation of the rectum and colon, with suffering, much tenesmus, prolonged efforts and great exhaustion.
rubric_passages.Rectum, constipation: He hurries to stool and passes a little lump and some liquid, and is soon hurried again to stool and more lumps and liquid are passed.
rubric_passages.Skin: The skin is ulcerated and has a tendency to grow warts, callosities, bad nails and bad hair.
rubric_passages.Stomach: Constant nausea, lump in the stomach, feeling all the time as if he had an overloaded stomach, as if he had eaten too much, and that is when he had not eaten at all.
rubric_passages.Stomach, eructations: The stomach feels distended although the abdomen is flat. He feels distended and vomits the contents of the stomach; he vomits slime after he has emptied the stomach of its contents; prolonged retching, nausea, sickening load in the stomach and it seems to go on and on.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, pain: In the abdomen we have a group of symptoms; violent abdominal pains, burning, great distension; there appears to be an increasing distension as if by a screw, gradually forcing down upon something gradually increasing the tension.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness: Moments of great exhaustion, sudden attacks of weakness and fainting.
rubric_passages.Appetite: He has loathing of food; the thought and smell of food disturb him.
rubric_passages.Appetite, aversion: He has loathing of food; the thought and smell of food disturb him. This is like Arsenicum.
rubric_passages.Clinical: Troublesome hemorrhoids in old gouty constitutions. They are always sore and inflamed from a cold, wet day, from cold bathing and, are always worse if he is foolish enough to drink sour wine or take sour food.
rubric_passages.Mind, night: This patient is worse at night, worse in damp weather, worse from damp cold, better from lying down quietly, better from applied heat, but much worse from over-heating and from radiated heat, and in a warm room.
rubric_passages.Abdomen: In the abdomen we have a group of symptoms; violent abdominal pains, burning, great distension; there appears to be an increasing distension as if by a screw, gradually forcing down upon something gradually increasing the tension.

profile.personality: A deeply depleted, passive constitution prone to collapse and exhaustion. These individuals are typically elderly, chronically ill, or constitutionally weakened — old gouty patients, broken-down drunkards, or feeble children who seem to have aged prematurely. They present as cold, pale, sunken, and marked by an overall lack of vital reactive power.
profile.mental_state: The mind mirrors the body's profound prostration — there is a docile, semi-conscious quality where the patient can fall asleep even amid severe suffering, snoring through dyspnoea. Mental activity is minimal; everything is experienced as a burden, and the patient wants only to be left alone, undisturbed. When not in this torpid state, there is a deadly anxiety born from the sensation of suffocating and sinking toward death.
profile.emotional_pattern: Extreme irritability when disturbed — the child grunts with offense when offered water, the adult is annoyed by any attempt to help or intervene. Beneath this irritability lies a pervasive, wordless anxiety and a deathly loathing that extends beyond food to all external engagement. The core emotional tone is one of weary, overwhelmed withdrawal combined with the desperate fear of someone who feels they are dying.

rubric_passages.Chest: The chest is full of mucous and it rattles; the cough is a rattling cough, but the mucus does not come up, or only a small quantity comes up, but it does not relieve him. His chest is full of mucus, he is suffocating and he is really passing away, dying from carbonic acid poisoning due to a lack of expulsive power.
rubric_passages.Chill: Little fever, cold sweat, coldness, relaxation, Hippocratic aspect. So it is the remedy that closes out the scene with the severe cases of bronchitis, pneumonia; most of these cases die in an Antimonium tart. state.
rubric_passages.Chill, trembling and shivering: This patient is an old gouty patient, debilitated from long illness, always shivering, pale, with enlarged joints. Every spell of wet weather brings on a catarrhal state of the chest, larynx and trachea which runs into a state of copious secretion of mucus.
rubric_passages.Extremities: The joints are affected, take on a passive, slow infiltration and become dropsical; dropsical swelling of all the joints. Gouty infiltration of the joints, and these are especially bad during the cold, wet weather.
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness: So long as the reaction is good and his strength holds up you will not see this Hippocratic countenance, sinking, and coldness and cold sweat.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Antimonium tart. has weakness and lack of reaction. Hence we see that it is suitable in those cases that present this state, or in such patients as are so feeble, when they are taken down, that they at once enter upon a passive or relaxed state.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness, enervation: It is a paralytic condition of the lungs. It may occur in cases of grippe. At first it may be a case that comes on quite rapidly, running a rapid course. It may be a case that produces early prostration, that is, in three or four days or a week.
rubric_passages.Mouth: The patient is often choked while this thick, ropy, white mucus is expelled from the oesophagus and mouth. The mouth fills up with it.
rubric_passages.Respiration: Many times the respiration is a moaning respiration. Rattling and moaning.
rubric_passages.Respiration, difficult: Every sharp cold spell in the winter brings on catarrh of the chest, with thick white mucus, and attended with great dyspnoea, driving him to bed. He must sit up in bed and be fanned; cannot lie down because of the difficult breathing, and filling up of the chest.
rubric_passages.Skin: Antimonium is a common cause of the fever sore, the lingering indolent ulcer that forms upon the legs following old fevers in broken down constitutions. Sometimes they never get rid of them.
rubric_passages.Sleep: He has also a docile state and if allowed to be quiet, in spite of all the sufferings, he will fall into a sleep, or go into a state of inability to feel. He will cough and sleep, and snore through the dyspnoea.
rubric_passages.Sleep, sleepiness: If allowed to be quiet, in spite of all the sufferings, he will fall into a sleep, or go into a state of inability to feel. He will cough and sleep, and snore through the dyspnoea.
rubric_passages.Stomach: With all the complaints the stomach gives out, and there is nausea, inability to digest and loathing of food. Vomiting of everything taken into the stomach; vomiting of even a spoonful of water.
rubric_passages.Stomach, thirst: In most complaints this remedy is thirstless. It is an exception that it has thirst. Generally in these attacks of dyspnoea the friends of the patient stand around with a very strong desire to do something, if it is only to hand a glass of water. This patient is irritated by being offered a swallow of water.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, pain: Sharp, cutting pains, as with knives. Most violent pains in the abdomen.
rubric_passages.Clinical, paralysis: It is a paralytic condition of the lungs.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness: Antimonium tart. has weakness and lack of reaction. Hence we see that it is suitable in those cases that present this state, or in such patients as are so feeble, when they are taken down, that they at once enter upon a passive or relaxed state.
rubric_passages.Appetite: Loathes everything, loathes food; vomits even water. Aversion to milk and every other kind of nourishment, but milk especially makes the patient sick, causing nausea and vomiting.
rubric_passages.Clinical: Old gouty patients, old drunkards; old broken down constitutions. In children also that have broken down constitutions, as if they had grown old. These take cold in the chest, with great rattling of mucus and require this remedy.
rubric_passages.Abdomen: The stomach and abdomen are greatly distended with flatulence. The abdomen is tympanitic. The abdomen may be distended with serum, or it may be distended with flatus.

profile.personality: Restless, busy, and awkward, constantly changing tasks with poor coordination. Extremely sensitive to heat in all forms, with a general aggravation from warmth and amelioration from cold. Complaints arise with great violence and rapidity.
profile.mental_state: Marked by foolish, silly, childish behavior inappropriate to the situation, including nonsensical talk on serious occasions. Prone to stupor, delirium, and loquacity in acute states, with disturbance of coordination and dizziness when the eyes are shut. Ailments arise from fright, rage, vexation, jealousy, or hearing bad news.
profile.emotional_pattern: Dominated by great sadness and constant, causeless weeping day and night, with absolute joylessness and indifference to anything that should bring happiness. Foolishly suspicious and jealous, borrowing trouble about everything, with extreme irritability. Carries a premonition and dread of death, with intense anxiety and inability to apply good fortune to oneself.

profile.personality: A deeply chilly, water-retentive constitution who is prostrated and weakened, with a tendency toward profound exhaustion following lingering illness. The patient is passive, enduring, and physically overwhelmed — one who takes in but cannot release, reflecting a fundamental stagnation in vital force.
profile.mental_state: Mental symptoms are poorly developed in provings, but the known state is one of stupor, bewilderment, and low spirits. In advanced cases there is great mental dullness progressing to unconsciousness, as seen in hydrocephalic conditions with head-rolling and emaciation.
profile.emotional_pattern: The core emotional tone is one of anguish, helplessness, and a desire to cry without clear cause — 'feels as if she could do nothing but cry.' There is a low-spirited despondency tied to the physical sensation of being waterlogged and unable to find relief, with facial expression reflecting deep suffering.

rubric_passages.Bladder: The bladder is sometimes only partially full, but he cannot pass urine.
rubric_passages.Chest: Sense of pressure in the epigastrium, in the chest, so that it is almost impossible for him to get breath enough to move.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Everywhere the functions are impaired, in the skin, the kidneys, bowels, uterus, and all tends toward the formation of dropsy.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: The ovaries and uterus fail to perform their functions, and amenorrhoea comes on with dropsical conditions.
rubric_passages.Respiration: Great oppression about the epigastrium. Difficult breathing. Gasping for breath. Wheezing and coughing.
rubric_passages.Stomach: Very little food makes him feel distended. He wakes up and wants something in his stomach. There is a gnawing hunger, but every little thing, even a mouthful, makes him feel distended. His stomach is already full of water and he vomits up great quantities of water, of bile, and of undigested substances that he has swallowed.
rubric_passages.Stomach, pain: He has a pain in the stomach, and even vomits, from cold drinks. Pain in the abdomen from cold drinks.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: Many times in hydrocephalus pains shoot along the nevers and attack the joints.
rubric_passages.Clinical: It was a routine medicine once, given to all children for wetting the bed, and as it cured many it must have that symptom, but that is a clinical symptom.
rubric_passages.Abdomen: Abdomen very much distended; dropsy of the abdomen.
rubric_passages.Stool: The diarrhea is copious, yellow, watery and involuntary.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain, pressing: Sense of pressure in the epigastrium, in the chest, so that it is almost impossible for him to get breath enough to move.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, menses: I have mentioned the suppression of the menstrual flow, the amenorrhoea, but it has also a marked hemorrhagic tendency. It will establish haemorrhage anywhere, but especially from the uterus.
rubric_passages.Chest, oppression: Great oppression about the epigastrium. Difficult breathing. Gasping for breath. Wheezing and coughing.
rubric_passages.Stomach, vomiting: He drinks and vomits. It is with difficulty he can eat; cannot keep it down; it will not digest.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, dropsy, ascites: Abdomen very much distended; dropsy of the abdomen.
rubric_passages.Chest, dropsy: You will think a moment and see that filling up the pleural cavity does not cause very much outward distension, because the ribs prevent it. They form a wall, and hence the growth or distension is towards the lungs, and downward towards the diaphragm. By this means we get increasing dyspnoea, with cough.
rubric_passages.Respiration, rattling: It has all the rattling that is found in Tartar emetic and Tartar emetic has a similar filling up of the chest, cannot lie down.
rubric_passages.Stool, thin, liquid: The diarrhea is copious, yellow, watery and involuntary.
rubric_passages.Stool, watery, Stool, watery: The diarrhea is copious, yellow, watery and involuntary.
rubric_passages.Stool, watery: The diarrhea is copious, yellow, watery and involuntary.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, dropsy: Abdomen very much distended; dropsy of the abdomen.
rubric_passages.Stool, thin: The diarrhea is copious, yellow, watery and involuntary.
rubric_passages.Bladder, urging to urinate (morbid desir: The bladder is sometimes only partially full, but he cannot pass urine. Retention with great urging.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain, pressing externally: Sense of pressure in the epigastrium, in the chest, so that it is almost impossible for him to get breath enough to move.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, menses, copious: The menstrual flow may become copious, too frequent, last too long; but it will also establish a uterine haemorrhage at another time.
rubric_passages.Stomach, pain, drinking, after: He likes cold water, but it so disagrees with his stomach, causing pain in the stomach, or causing him to vomit before it even gets warm, or causing distension, or causing uneasiness, so that he dreads to take cold drinks.
rubric_passages.Stomach, pain, drinking: He has a pain in the stomach, and even vomits, from cold drinks. Pain in the abdomen from cold drinks.

profile.personality: An intellectually driven individual—a thinker, student, or business person—who has become prematurely aged and broken down from overwork. They appear careworn, pale, sickly, and far older than their years, as if 'a man of forty is like one of eighty.' They are lean, increasingly nervous, and given to strange whims that alienate those around them.
profile.mental_state: The intellect is primarily affected while the affections remain relatively intact; memory and reasoning deteriorate progressively toward imbecility. Mental effort brings on vertigo, headaches, and fatigue, and the patient wakes unrefreshed with mental exhaustion. They lose the thread of discourse, forget what they were saying, and fly rapidly from subject to subject in a state resembling intoxication.
profile.emotional_pattern: Intensely sensitive to surroundings, easily disturbed by annoyance, fear, anger, and fright, losing emotional balance readily. Pain drives them into wild rage and delirious excitement with rapid nonsensical speech. They are anxious about their health, dread social interaction out of a sense of incompetence, and suffer electric-like shocks from nervous agitation just as they try to find rest.

rubric_passages.Back: Pain in the back and limbs while sitting, better while walking.
rubric_passages.Back, pain: Pain in the small of the back while sitting.
rubric_passages.Bladder: Catarrhal inflammation of the mucous membranes of the urinary passages, the whole urinary tract. It cures albuminuria; it cures diabetes, with sugar in the urine; and many of the broken-down conditions of the kidneys.
rubric_passages.Bladder, urination, frequent: Enormous quantities of whey-like urine. A copious flow of urine. Children lose the urine in sleep. Broken-down, nervous constitutions lose the urine in sleep.
rubric_passages.Chest: It has a sense of weakness of the chest. Weak voice, weak chest; a feeling that it is so difficult to, breathe, and so difficult to talk, and so difficult to cough, because the muscles of the chest feel so weak.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, palpitation: Palpitation when lying on the back. Frequent palpitation. During pregnancy, palpitation. Palpitation at night. Palpitation associated with headaches.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Numbness in the limbs, as if asleep. Loss of power. Many of the complaints are increased during rest. Pain in the back and limbs while sitting, better while walking.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Mental weakness. Physical prostration. Rending, tearing pains, Affections of the joints, the cartilages of the joints. Tearing pains along the bones and he is really a wreck, an old broken down constitution when he is yet young. A man of forty is like one of eighty. All these pains are better from motion.
rubric_passages.Generalities, side, right: Another marked feature is that it affects both testes, but it has a predominant action in the right. The left ovary and the right testis.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness, enervation: Gradually increasing weakness. From his general weakness the knees knock together when walking. Trembling in the knees with palpitation and general weakness.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: In the female we have ovarian troubles, infiltration, hardness, cystic troubles, cystic ovaries, that are cured by this remedy; ovarian tumors; very large, hard indurated ovaries-especially the left. The right testicle, the left ovary. Pain in the left ovary and back. Prolapsus, with pain in left ovary.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, pain: Pain in the left ovary and back. Prolapsus, with pain in left ovary. Pain in the small of the back while sitting.
rubric_passages.Head: The headaches are frontal and occipital. One-sided brain affection. One-sided headaches. Violent neuralgia in the head upon one side at a time, as if deep in the brain, as if involving one-half of the brain, Mostly the headaches have been on the right side-the one-sided headaches.
rubric_passages.Mind: It scarcely disturbs his affections; only makes slight and vague changes in his voluntary system. But the memory, the intellectual part of man is disturbed increasingly to imbecility. In great sufferings and it is full of suffering - it affects his ability to reason.
rubric_passages.Skin: Itching and burning, like frost bite. It has an itching and burning like Agaricus, in the toes, in the ears, and he scratches the part, and scratching does not relieve it until the skin is off, until it oozes, but no relief from scratching.
rubric_passages.Sleep: All symptoms are worse after sleep. Instead of being rested for the day, he wakes in the morning with mental fatigue and weakness, so that he can hardly move, and it is with great difficulty that he gets himself together for a mental or physical effort of another day.
rubric_passages.Vertigo: Reasoners come to a point when they can no longer reason and the slightest mental effort brings on vertigo. Dizziness with vertigo as if intoxicated.
rubric_passages.Bladder, urination: Enormous quantities of whey-like urine. A copious flow of urine. Children lose the urine in sleep. Broken-down, nervous constitutions lose the urine in sleep.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: Another strange feature about it, it is full of rending, tearing pains along the nerves, predominantly of the lower extremities. Tearing, as if the nerves would be torn in pieces (during rest).
rubric_passages.Generalities, side: Such things are singular, that in one sex it should produce symptoms in one side of the body, and in the other sex on the, opposite side.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness: Mental weakness. Physical prostration. He is fatigued. All symptoms are worse after sleep. Instead of being rested for the day, he wakes in the morning with mental fatigue and weakness, so that he can hardly move.
rubric_passages.Clinical: It has cured epithelioma. It is on record as curing pp epithelioma of the cervix uteri. Yellowish-greenish gonorrhea of an indolent character from the beginning, of eight months standing.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, heart: This remedy is full of cardiac disturbances. Palpitation when lying on the back. A sense of trembling in the chest. A sense of quivering, fluttering, or trembling, as it will be described by the different patients, trembling in the chest.

profile.personality: An intellectual, cerebral type prone to mental overexertion and nervous exhaustion. Typically found among brain workers, students, businessmen, and performers who sustain prolonged mental excitement. Desires cold air, cold drinks, and open spaces; suffocates in warm, crowded environments.
profile.mental_state: The mind is dominated by irrational thoughts, strange impulses, and intrusive ideation—such as the urge to jump from heights or the conviction that passing a certain street corner will cause a fit. Memory and reason are disturbed, leading to foolish conclusions and peculiar justifications for bizarre conduct. Tormented by an influx of troublesome thoughts, especially at night, producing extreme restlessness and compulsive walking.
profile.emotional_pattern: Profound anticipatory anxiety is the hallmark: dread before engagements, journeys, or any future event, with trembling and sweating that resolve only once the event begins. Easily angered and vehement, with physical complaints (headache, cough, diarrhea) arising directly from emotional excitement. Pervaded by a fixed conviction that all undertakings must fail, coupled with a persistent fear of death and melancholic sadness.

rubric_passages.Back: Pain in the lumbar region comes on while sitting, but is better when standing a walking. Pain in the back from flatulence. Sore pain in the spine. Pain in back at night. Great weight in the lumbar region. It is a very useful remedy in locomotor ataxia.
rubric_passages.Bladder, urination, frequent: Urging to urinate; the urine passes less easily and freely.
rubric_passages.Chest: On waking in the morning limbs feel bruised aching in the chest,
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, palpitation: Violent palpitation from the slightest mental emotion or sudden muscular exertion. Palpitation obliges her to press hand hard against heart for relief. Hearts action irregular, intermittent,
rubric_passages.Extremities: Upon the mucous membranes and skin ulceration, and this progresses and the heart becomes increasingly feeble, and the extremities become cold and blue and the lips are cold and blue, with aggravation of all these complaints from mental excitement, from going to the opera, from meeting a friend, from keeping an engagement.
rubric_passages.Extremities, paralysis: This state of mind progress until there is a general state of weakness; with trembling, paralysis, numbness, disturbed functions, palpitation, throbbing all over the body, with the mental state.
rubric_passages.Generalities: There is one grand feature running through this patient modifying most of his symptoms, with few exceptions, and that is that he is like a Pulsatilla patient; he wants cold air, cold drinks, cold things; wants ice, ice cream; wants the head in the cold air; suffocates in a warm room.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: She suffers from most violent dysmenorrhoea, from nervous excitement, from hysterical manifestations, and an unusually increased flow.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, pain: Pains like sticks or slivers in and about the womb.
rubric_passages.Head: The headaches are of a congestive character; considerable throbbing, ameliorated by cold, and tight bandaging. Headache from mental exertion from excitement, with vertigo, nausea and vomiting. Pains in the right side of the head, jagging, cutting, stitching pulsating. Head feels much enlarged.
rubric_passages.Mind: First of all, disturbance in the memory, disturbance of reason, he becomes most irrational in his explanations of his actions. He is irrational and does strange things and comes to strange conclusions; foolish things. He has all sorts of imaginations, illusions, hallucinations.
rubric_passages.Mind, restlessness, nervousness: He is tormented in his mind by the inflowing of troublesome thoughts, and especially at night his thoughts torment him. to the extent that he is extremely anxious and this puts him in a hurry and in a fidget and he goes out and walks and walks, and the faster he walks the faster he thinks he must walk, and he walks till fatigued.
rubric_passages.Mouth: Eructations of air accompanied by a mouthful of undigested food, like Phosphorus and Ferrum. Spitting it up; welling up in mouthfuls
rubric_passages.Rectum: Another feature in connection with the diarrhea and dysentery is that casts are passed with the stool, like diphtheritic membrane or deposit; casts like the rectum, strings of membrane, come with the stool. Stools of green, foetid mucus with noisy flatus at night.
rubric_passages.Respiration: He suffocates from warm clothing, wants the door and windows open; cannot breathe in a stuffy room, suffocates if other people are in the room; cannot go to church or to the opera, cannot go to places of amusement or gatherings, must stay at home.
rubric_passages.Sleep: The sleep symptoms are quite general. Distressing nightmares. The dreams are horrible Wakens in excitement and with starting. All sorts of strange, horrible things in sleep. Dreams of vicious and violent things, and that everything is going to happen to him. Dreams of departed friends, etc.
rubric_passages.Stomach: The nervous state continues until there is disorder of all the organs of the body. The stomach refuses to digest, everything taken, seems to go into gas, and he becomes distended and suffers with pain.
rubric_passages.Stomach, distension: Do not forget that this medicine is one of the most flatulent medicines in the books. He is distended to bursting; gets scarcely any relief from passing flatus or eructations.
rubric_passages.Stomach, eructations: Eructations relieve. Flatulence passes upwards, in quantities. Frequent eructations. Eructations do not always relieve.
rubric_passages.Stomach, pain: The stomach, liver and abdomen are full of pain. The abdomen distended with all this troublesome flatulence. Inflammation of the stomach, ulceration of the stomach, most troublesome diarrhea.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, pain: Haemorrhage of short duration; shooting pains through abdomen and stomach.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: The medicine is preeminently a nervous one, full of spinal symptoms, rending, tearing pains down the extremities; such pains are found in locomotor ataxia fulgurating shooting pains.
rubric_passages.Clinical, paralysis: This state of mind progress until there is a general state of weakness; with trembling, paralysis, numbness, disturbed functions, palpitation, throbbing all over the body, with the mental state.
rubric_passages.Generalities, side: Patient cannot lie on the right side because it brings on so much palpitations.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness: Sadness, melancholy and confusion. Defective memory. The sight of high houses makes him dizzy, and his vertigo is increased or comes on from closing the eyes; with the vertigo there is buzzing in the ears, great weakness and trembling.
rubric_passages.Mind, restlessness: Great restlessness. The nervous symptoms are very numerous. Periodical trembling of the body. Chorea, with tearing in the legs. Convulsions preceded by great restlessness. Nervous faintish, tremulous sensation, etc.

profile.personality: A morose, irritable individual who strongly desires solitude and resists all forms of approach, both physical and social. They are independently minded to the point of denying obvious illness, insisting nothing is wrong even when gravely sick, and rejecting help from those who care about them.
profile.mental_state: Dominated by stupor and confusion that alternates with sharp irritability; when roused from a semi-conscious or comatose state, they answer correctly but cannot sustain focus and drift back into oblivion. They struggle to find correct words, deny their condition with surprising vehemence, and exhibit a delirium marked by hopelessness, indifference, and hypochondriacal anxiety about deep-seated disease.
profile.emotional_pattern: Pervaded by a profound, recurring horror of instant death—especially at night—that manifests as sudden cardiac terror, grasping at the heart, and desperate calls for help, only to subside and repeat in cycles. They are fearful and easily frightened, haunted by nightmares of robbers and muddy water, and carry a baseline of peevishness and dread that anyone or anything approaching will cause them harm.

rubric_passages.Back: Arnica is a very important remedy in injuries, bruises and shocks, injuries of joints, injury of the back with lameness and soreness.
rubric_passages.Back, pain: Arnica is a very important remedy in injuries, bruises and shocks, injuries of joints, injury of the back with lameness and soreness.
rubric_passages.Bladder: In inflammation of the kidneys and bladder, of the liver, and even in pneumonia, the mental state and the sore, bruised feeling all over the body would enable you to do astonishing work in such cases.
rubric_passages.Chest: It has all there is of the rusty expectoration, with all the soreness of the chest and catarrhal state, the coughing and gagging, and sore, bruised feeling all over the body.
rubric_passages.Chill: A general feature also of the remedy is that the body is cold and the head hot; the whole body and the extremities are cold, but the head feels hot. This is a marked condition in sudden congestive attacks, in congestive chill and congestive intermittent fevers.
rubric_passages.Extremities: the whole body and the extremities are cold, but the head feels hot.
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness: the whole body and the extremities are cold, but the head feels hot.
rubric_passages.Generalities: all over the body there is a lameness, and soreness, and a feeling as if bruised; a rheumatic lameness; the joints are swollen, sore and lame.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness, enervation: Weary, bruised, sore, great weakness, must lie down, yet bed feels too hard.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: The extreme sensitiveness, soreness or tenderness throughout the whole body is especially felt in the abdominal viscera, in the uterus and pelvic region.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, pain: Sensitiveness to the motion of the foetus sore and bruised; the motions of the foetus are very painful and keep her awake all night.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, pain, sore, uterus: The extreme sensitiveness, soreness or tenderness throughout the whole body is especially felt in the abdominal viscera, in the uterus and pelvic region. Sensitiveness to the motion of the foetus sore and bruised; the motions of the foetus are very painful and keep her awake all night.
rubric_passages.Head: the body is cold and the head hot; the whole body and the extremities are cold, but the head feels hot.
rubric_passages.Mind: The Amica patient is morose, wants to be let alone, does not want to be talked to, does not want to be approached. He does not want to be approached, both because he does not wish to enter into conversation, a mental state, and also because he does not wish to be touched on account of the great bodily soreness.
rubric_passages.Mind, irritability: Irritable, morose, sad, fearful, easily frightened, imagines all sorts of things, especially that he has heart disease, or that he will mortify, or that some deep-seated trouble is upon him.
rubric_passages.Mouth: when the tongue becomes shiny, and sordes appear about the teeth and lips, when there is sinking, and soreness all over the body.
rubric_passages.Rectum: Stool involuntary during sleep. Stools of undigested food, purulent; bloody slimy, mucus: Dark blood, very foetid stool.
rubric_passages.Respiration: It has all there is of the rusty expectoration, with all the soreness of the chest and catarrhal state, the coughing and gagging.
rubric_passages.Skin: It produces in its pathogenesis mottled spots, like bruises. If you take Arnica internally, in large doses, you will have mottled spots, bluish spots, which become yellowish, due to ecchymoses, from extravasations of the smaller capillaries.
rubric_passages.Sleep: Full of nightmare, dreadful dreams, dreams of muddy water, robbers, etc. Horrors in the night. He frequently rouses up in the night, grasps at the heart, has the appearance of great horror.
rubric_passages.Stomach: Arnica has aversion to meat, broth and milk. Vomiting of dark-red coagula, mouth bitter; general soreness. Vomiting of black, inky substances.
rubric_passages.Stomach, eructations: Offensiveness is a feature of Arnica; there is offensiveness of the eructations, and the flatus.
rubric_passages.Stomach, pain: Vomiting of dark-red coagula, mouth bitter; general soreness.
rubric_passages.Stomach, thirst: There is great thirst at particular times, for instance, during the chill of intermittent fever he has thirst, while at other times he is thirstless.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, pain: Arnica is a useful remedy in inflammatory conditions of the abdomen, liver, intestines, with tumefaction tympanites, prostration, tendency to uneasiness, and so sore that he cannot be touched.
rubric_passages.Bladder, urination: Retention of urine from exertion, from overwork, from injury, from concussion of the brain, from some violent accident. The urine is brown, or inky, dark. Constant dribbling of urine after labor.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: all over the body he is sore and bruised, as if he had been beaten.

profile.personality: Extremely fastidious and orderly, needing everything in its proper place — described as 'the gold-headed cane patient.' Restless and driven, constantly moving from place to place, unable to find comfort or settle, with a deep-seated need for company and aversion to solitude.
profile.mental_state: Dominated by anxiety intermingled with fear, particularly fear of death, fear of being alone, and a pervasive sense that something terrible is about to happen. Thoughts crowd upon the mind relentlessly, with an inability to hold onto one idea, progressing from agitated restlessness toward exhaustion and prostration. Worse after midnight (1-2 AM) and in the evening as darkness comes on.
profile.emotional_pattern: Profound sadness and melancholy leading to despair of recovery and weariness of life, with suicidal inclinations. A deep undercurrent of anguish — not driven by physical pain but by a deathly inner anxiety — alternates with irritability and religious despair, such as the conviction of having sinned beyond redemption. Fear of solitude compels the need for company as a buffer against overwhelming dread.

rubric_passages.Abdomen, hard: distension of the abdomen, a tympanitic state; cannot be handled or touched, yet he will keep moving because he is so restless
rubric_passages.Bladder: You may go to a patient with high grade inflammation of the bladder, with frequent urging to urinate, straining to urinate, and there is bloody urine intermingled with clots.
rubric_passages.Bladder, urination, frequent: You may go to a patient with high grade inflammation of the bladder, with frequent urging to urinate, straining to urinate, and there is bloody urine intermingled with clots.
rubric_passages.Chest: There is in the chest a sense of burning, as if coals of fire were in the chest, and it goes on to bleeding and liver-colored expectoration.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, palpitation: great palpitation, palpitation from the least exertion or excitement, great anxiety, anguish, weakness; he cannot walk, he cannot go upstairs, he can hardly move without increasing the palpitation; every excitement brings on palpitation.
rubric_passages.Chill: Arsenic has all the violence of the chill that you can find in any remedy, with excitement, headache, prostration, dry mouth, desire for hot drinks and to be covered up warmly, with all the anxious restlessness and prostration that you can find in any medicine
rubric_passages.Extremities: dropsy of the penis, oedematous appearance, so that the penis is enormously swollen and looks like a water bag; the scrotum, especially the skin of the scrotum, greatly swollen
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness: great coldness, covered with cold sweat, cold extremities, cold as death
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness, hands: The chill is attended with great aching in the bones, likely to commence in the extremities, and during the chill there is a great head congestion with purple fingers and toes.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Anxiety, restlessness, prostration, burning and cadaveric odors are prominent characteristics.
rubric_passages.Generalities, faintness, fainting: Severe paroxysms of palpitation or attacks of syncope during endocarditis.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain, burning, internally: The burning is felt in the stomach; there is burning in the bladder, in the vagina, in the lungs. It feels as if coals of fire were in the, lungs at times, when gangrenous inflammation is threatened, and in certain stages of pneumonia.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness, enervation: the prostration becomes so marked that he is able to move only his limbs until at last he becomes so weak that he is no longer able to move and he lies in perfect quiet in extreme prostration.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: In the female, violent, burning pains in the genitals with or without swelling, burning that extends up into the vagina, with great dryness and itching of the vagina.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, pain: In the female, violent, burning pains in the genitals with or without swelling, burning that extends up into the vagina, with great dryness and itching of the vagina.
rubric_passages.Head: The periodical headaches of Arsenic are found in all parts of the head. They are the congestive headaches with throbbing and burning, with anxiety and restlessness; hot head and relief from cold.
rubric_passages.Mind: The mental symptoms show in the beginning anxious restlessness, and from this a continuation towards delirium and even insanity with all that it involves; disturbance of the intellect and will.
rubric_passages.Mind, restlessness, nervousness: The restlessness seems to be mostly in the mind; it is an anxious restlessness, or an anguish, with the idea that anguish is a deathly anxiety.
rubric_passages.Mind, restlessness, night: The attacks of anxiety at night drive him out of bed. This is an anxiety that affects the heart, and so the mental anxiety and cardiac anxiety almost seem to coincide. A sudden anxious fear comes over him at night; he jumps out of bed with fear that he is going to die, or that he is going to suffocate.
rubric_passages.Mouth: his mouth was black, parched and dry.
rubric_passages.Mouth, dryness: his mouth was black, parched and dry. He got Arsenic. One of the characteristic features of Arsenic is thirst for small quantities often, just enough to wet the mouth.

profile.personality: A restless, hurried, and impatient individual who is highly sensitive to their environment, both physically and emotionally. They alternate between talkativeness and aversion to being spoken to, displaying changeable moods and a fundamental mental prostration that underlies their driven exterior.
profile.mental_state: The mind is marked by confusion, indecisiveness, and wandering thoughts, with an inability to choose between two opinions and a sense of gradually losing mental control. There is oversensitivity to noise and external stimuli, aversion to mental exertion which worsens symptoms, and a persistent fear of insanity that reflects their awareness of their own cognitive decline.
profile.emotional_pattern: Deep anxiety, restlessness, and sadness pervading to despair form the emotional core, accompanied by irritability during all complaints and a growing indifference toward friends, happiness, and surroundings. Sudden violent impulses may surface alongside timidity and fear of people and misfortune, revealing an inner tension between withdrawal and volatile emotional discharge.

rubric_passages.Bladder: It acts deeply upon the bladder and kidneys. It has been most useful in Addison's disease.
rubric_passages.Chest: There is marked anxiety in the region of the heart. Catarrh of the bronchial tubes; constriction of the chest, of the heart; fatty degeneration of the heart. Enlarged and painful mammae. Heat in the chest.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, palpitation: palpitation from excitement, from exertion; tumultuous palpitation.
rubric_passages.Chill: Chill at night in bed; chill external and internal, worse from motion. Quartian, tertian shaking-chill; periodicity marked; warm room does not ameliorate the chill.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Coldness of hands, legs and feet; cramps of upper limbs, lower limbs, thighs, legs and feet; scaly eruptions, eczema and vesicles; heat of hands; heaviness of the limbs as though tired; heaviness of the feet.
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness: Coldness of hands, legs and feet
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness, hands: Coldness of hands, legs and feet; cramps of upper limbs, lower limbs, thighs, legs and feet
rubric_passages.Generalities: From a study of the elements making up this agent, it may be known that it is a deep-acting constitutional remedy. Its complaints come on in the morning, afternoon, evening, night, after midnight. In hectic conditions, with many abscesses. Extreme anaemia, such as belongs to tuberculous subjects.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness, enervation: Weakness, like a vital prostration, in the morning, when ascending, on exertion, during menses, and on walking; worse in wet weather, worse from the worm south wind.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: It has been a great comfort to the women in many complaints. It has restrained the progress of cancer of uterus in a notable manner; the burning and odor are removed and the ulceration is lessened.
rubric_passages.Mind: Anger and irritability during all complaints; aversion to answering questions; extreme anxiety, restlessness and fear; worse in a warm bed; confusion of mind morning and evening; delirium during the night; illusions of fancy and delusions about dead people.
rubric_passages.Mind, restlessness, nervousness: extreme anxiety, restlessness and fear; worse in a warm bed
rubric_passages.Mouth: In the mouth there are aphthae; the gums bleed easily, and the tongue is cracked. The tongue is coated brown or white; mouth and tongue are dry at night and during sleep, the tongue feels enlarged, inflammation of the gums.
rubric_passages.Respiration: The voice is hoarse, rough and weak and finally lost; respiration is fast and asthmatic; respiration is difficult at night, on ascending, on exertion and motion, with palpitation; respiration is irregular, rattling, short, suffocative and wheezing.
rubric_passages.Skin: Anaesthesia of the skin; burning skin; the skin is jaundiced; liver spots and red spots. The skin is cold to touch; dryness of the skin with inability to perspire. Many eruptions on the skin; boils, pustules, rash and scales moist eruptions, eczema, itching eruption; herpes; psoriasis.
rubric_passages.Stomach: The appetite is increased, even ravenous; aversion to food; constriction of the stomach; the stomach is distended.
rubric_passages.Appetite, ravenous, canine, excessive: The appetite is increased, even ravenous
rubric_passages.Bladder, urination: Retention of urine; constant or frequent urging to urinate; worse during the night; urination is dribbling and involuntary, suppression of urine; the urine is albuminous, cloudy, dark, red, copious or scanty and offensive.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness: Weakness, like a vital prostration, in the morning, when ascending, on exertion, during menses, and on walking; worse in wet weather, worse from the worm south wind.
rubric_passages.Mind, restlessness: extreme anxiety, restlessness and fear; worse in a warm bed
rubric_passages.Appetite: The appetite is increased, even ravenous; aversion to food
rubric_passages.Appetite, ravenous: The appetite is increased, even ravenous
rubric_passages.Clinical: It has been most useful in Addison's disease.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, heart: Paralysis of the heart, of the lungs. It is a very useful remedy in ulcerative conditions during phthisis; swollen axillary glands: tremulous heart; tumor of the axilla. Great weakness of chest and heart.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, uterus: It has restrained the progress of cancer of uterus in a notable manner; the burning and odor are removed and the ulceration is lessened. Life has been prolonged to four years in several cases.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation: There is marked anxiety in the region of the heart. Catarrh of the bronchial tubes; constriction of the chest, of the heart; fatty degeneration of the heart.
rubric_passages.Face: The face becomes cold. Bluish lips and bluish circles about the eyes brownish, earthy, or pale face; again the face is red and there are circumscribed red cheeks the face is sallow and jaundiced; yellow spots on the face; sickly look the face looks drawn and emaciated; eruptions on face and nose; acne, eczema, pimples, pustules, expression sickly and old; pain in the face.
rubric_passages.Generalities, morning: Its complaints come on in the morning, afternoon, evening, night, after midnight.
rubric_passages.Mind, sadness, mental depression: Sadness, even to despair; discontentment, and he is often in a state of great excitement

profile.personality: A restless, compulsive type who cannot leave irritations alone, persistently picking and boring at raw surfaces despite the pain it causes. There is a driven, relentless quality — like the public speaker who pushes through hoarseness — combined with an inability to moderate self-destructive habits.
profile.mental_state: The mind is characterized by low-grade delirium with restless, purposeless activity — groping, picking, and handling things in a busy, muttering state. There is confusion and excitement that can escalate to maniacal manifestations, particularly during acute zymotic illnesses with high fever. Mental faculties are clouded, with an inability to direct attention away from physical irritation.
profile.emotional_pattern: Deep irritability and distress dominate, with sepulchral screaming when prevented from carrying out compulsive behaviors. There is a paradoxical pattern of self-inflicted suffering — the patient picks and bores into raw, bleeding surfaces despite the pain, screaming yet unable to stop. Emotional expression is volatile and uncontrollable, mirroring the voice that shifts unpredictably between pitches.

rubric_passages.Chest: Now, in the chest there is burning and rawness when coughing; this extends to the pit of the stomach.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Many boys have wandered in the low grounds where this wild turnip grows, and have taken a nip out of it, and probably remember the sensations in the mouth that they received at that time.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain, burning, internally: This remedy does have burning in the trachea, the whole length of it, during an attack of coughing, and burning in the larger branches of the bronchial tubes.
rubric_passages.Head: Heat in the head, determination of blood to the head. It has also cured eruptions upon the scalp like eczema.
rubric_passages.Mind: Among other complaints, sore throats, zymotic affections, delirium and excitement, even maniacal manifestations.
rubric_passages.Mouth: Mouth burns and is sore. Cries when anything is offered. Buccal cavity covered with diphtheritic ulcers, also with aphthous patches, which cover the whole mouth and tongue.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: The sneezing is like an ordinary coryza, with repeated chills over the body, and aching in the bones as if the bones would break.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain, burning: The fluid from the nose as it flows over the skin leaves red streaks.
rubric_passages.Clinical: It has been a guiding feature in acute diseases, scarlet fever, many throat affections, diseases that take on a low type, such as continued fever and eruptive fevers.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, heart: It has soreness in the left side of the chest and left arm.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation: It has soreness in the left side of the chest and left arm. it has a sensation of fullness in the thorax and soreness extending down and involving the left lung.
rubric_passages.Face, heat: If you observe the nose and face you will be surprised to see that so much of the trouble is on the left side of the face, left nostril, left lachrymal duct, etc.
rubric_passages.Head, heat: Heat in the head, determination of blood to the head.
rubric_passages.Throat: It says "stinging," but it is a painful tingling, stinging like the sting of a bee, stinging pains in the throat, and the parts are ulcerated, raw and bleed.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, pain: It has a sensation of fullness in the thorax and soreness extending down and involving the left lung.
rubric_passages.Eye: You will see children boring in the nose, inside of nose. it is an inflammation of the nasal duct, the duct that leads from the eye to the nose, and accompanied by a discharge of tears over the cheeks.
rubric_passages.Larynx and trachea: This remedy does have burning in the trachea, the whole length of it, during an attack of coughing, and burning in the larger branches of the bronchial tubes.
rubric_passages.Larynx and trachea, voice, hoarseness: Voice hoarse; from over-exertion of the voice is speaking or singing.
rubric_passages.Mind, delirium: Among other complaints, sore throats, zymotic affections, delirium and excitement, even maniacal manifestations.
rubric_passages.Mouth, pain: Tongue cracked, bleeding, burning, painful; smarting on tongue and fauces.
rubric_passages.Throat, pain: Clergyman's sore throat, is not a good expression, because it is clergyman's hoarseness that is meant; hoarseness and rawness of the throat of public speakers when talking.
rubric_passages.Urine: In most of these complaints the urine is very scanty and is sometimes suppressed. You will very commonly note a good action of this medicine in these complaints by its immediately starting up a copious flow of urine. It is a sign of relief.
rubric_passages.Larynx and trachea, voice: Voice uncertain, uncontrollable, changing continually, now deep, now hoarse, etc.
rubric_passages.Eye, lid: It has also been found useful in catarrhal affections of the nose, eyes and lids.
rubric_passages.Mouth, tongue: The tongue is red, the papillae elevated; the tongue appears to be almost denuded. It is raw and bleeding, sometimes does bleed in a few places, and sometimes, after this has gone on for a few days, when the tongue is projected it looks like a big red strawberry, and for that reason has been called "Strawberry tongue."
rubric_passages.Face, pain (aching, prosopalgia, etc.): The nostrils are really so sore from the acridity of the fluids inside of the nose that it feels as if the nostrils were filled with fire.
rubric_passages.Fever: Typhoid forms of fever; picking ends of fingers and dry lips till they bleed, etc.

profile.personality: Fat, flabby individuals with a venous constitution who appear plethoric with puffed, purple faces despite deep-seated troubles. They are extremely nervous and sensitive to pain, prone to hysteria, and often told they receive no sympathy because they look so well despite being genuinely ill.
profile.mental_state: Marked by hysterical tendencies with fainting from minimal provocation—close rooms, excitement, or any disturbance can trigger episodes. There is a sensation of numbness pervading the mental sphere, with unintelligible speech, grinding of teeth, and choreic nervous manifestations suggesting deep nervous system involvement.
profile.emotional_pattern: Extreme emotional sensitivity and nervous excitability dominate, with a tendency toward hysteria manifesting as globus hystericus (sensation of a ball rising in the throat), spasmodic breathing, and fainting spells. The emotional state is characterized by a fundamental venous stagnation mirrored psychologically—complaints worsen during rest and inactivity, improving only with slow, gentle motion.

rubric_passages.Chest: "Pressure and burning of the sternum." "Compression of chest as from a heavy weight." "Stitches in chest." "Single, violent stitches from within outward, at short intervals."
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, palpitation: "Pulsation in pit of stomach; perceptible to sight and touch." "Pulsations after eating."
rubric_passages.Extremities: inflammation of cartilages with tumefaction and purple skin, stitching pains and dropsy, ulcerations and fistulous openings.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Most complaints come on during rest and are better by slow motion.
rubric_passages.Head: All over the head there is stitching pain, but in the frontal eminence, in the temples, there is a sensation as if a nail or plug were driven in, and most of the pains seem to bore, as if they extended from the bone to the surface, and hence are said to be from within out.
rubric_passages.Mind: fat, flabby persons, extremely nervous, extremely sensitive to pain, full of hysteria.
rubric_passages.Mind, irritability: fat, flabby persons, extremely nervous, extremely sensitive to pain, full of hysteria.
rubric_passages.Rectum: These patients are afflicted with diarrhoea from the slightest indigestion, after any indiscretion in diet, a painful watery diarrhoea.
rubric_passages.Skin: Old scars turn purple, threaten to suppurate, take on a venous aspect, become painful and turn black. Ulcers form at the site of old scars in old syphilitic patients and sometimes in psoric patients.
rubric_passages.Stomach: In the stomach troubles, if you have ever seen a typical case of Asa foetida, you will wonder where all the air comes from; it comes up in volumes.
rubric_passages.Stomach, eructations: "Eructations; smelling like garlic; tasting rancid, sharp or putrid."
rubric_passages.Abdomen, pain: The remedy has many gastric and abdominal complaints; full of bellyache; stitching pains, colic.
rubric_passages.Generalities, faintness: they go off almost from no cause into fainting; from a close room, from excitement, from any disturbance; sometimes cramps come on, but more especially fainting.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: They are subject to stitching pains from the bone to the surface; that is, from within out.
rubric_passages.Generalities, side: Shooting, stitching, tearing pains, under left frontal eminence.
rubric_passages.Clinical: Syphilis sometimes produces this kind of condition. Vascular disturbances in the body; periostitis, necrosis, induration of glands, nerve syphilis and head pains.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, heart: The venous side of the heart will often be involved, or be about to be involved, when you have this kind of face.
rubric_passages.Abdomen: The remedy has many gastric and abdominal complaints; full of bellyache; stitching pains, colic. The diarrhoea is more or less troublesome.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation: it shows more or less cardiac disturbance and venous stasis. The venous side of the heart will often be involved, or be about to be involved, when you have this kind of face.
rubric_passages.Face: Those cases that come into your office with puffed, venous, purple faces; they have an appearance of plethora; the face looks puffed, bloated and dropsical at times; it is a dark red, dusky face.
rubric_passages.Head, pain: This stitching pain is sometimes described as if a nail or plug were driven into the head. These nervous headaches are syphilitic hysterical or scrofulous; hysterical pains described as rending, tearing, stitching.
rubric_passages.Stool: "Liquid stools of most disgusting smell." "Blackish-brown papescent offensive stools, which relieve."
rubric_passages.Throat: a sensation of a ball rising in the throat, such as occurs in globus hystericus; choking, must constantly swallow.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain, pressing: "Pressing, cutting, stitching pains." "Compression of chest as from a heavy weight."
rubric_passages.Generalities, bones: The bone pains that are felt in the head are sometimes very distressing. Old syphilitic bone pains in the head, stitching, penetrating. It seems where there are lumps and nodules, about the head, this medicine seems to burry things.

profile.personality: Obstinate, irascible, and deeply serious individual who broods silently over inner turmoil while maintaining an outward appearance of intellectual competence. Responsible and conscientious to a fault, with a strong sense of duty that becomes a source of self-torment when they perceive any failure or neglect.
profile.mental_state: Profound hopelessness and despair with uncontrollable self-reproach, constantly imagining failure, neglected duties, and obstacles in every direction. The intellect may remain intact while the will is deeply disturbed, leading to silent brooding, loss of all enjoyment, and suicidal ideation. Insanity begins in the will and proceeds to the intellect, with an absorption in dark, self-critical rumination.
profile.emotional_pattern: A fundamental perversion of the natural love of life, manifesting as deep melancholy, loathing of existence, and longing for death. Alternates between silent, profound depression and sudden violent outbursts of anger and vehemence when disturbed; easily irritated by trifles, quarrelsome, yet inwardly consumed by grief, self-condemnation, and a conviction of personal worthlessness.

rubric_passages.Chest: At times it is a cardiac affection, with marked oppression behind the sternum with dyspnoea on walking fast for going upstairs.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, palpitation: Palpitation with great agony. Extreme oppression in the region of the heart on walking fast and going upstairs with oedema of the lower limbs.
rubric_passages.Chill: These violent orgasms come preparatory to the localization or establishment of some breakdown in the economy.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Fullness of the veins of the extremities; this goes on until swelling appears with weakness so that dropsy is prevalent throughout the remedy. Oedema of the extremities, with pitting upon pressure, which occurs in heart and liver affections.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Erethism or vascular fullness characterizes nearly all complaints.
rubric_passages.Generalities, side, right: Little knobs on the nose composed of varicose veins in heart cases, with disturbance of the right side of the heart; sometimes found in old drinkers and in heart affections generally.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: Induration of uterus. Menses too late and scanty. Uterus prolapsed and indurated. Leucorrhoea thick white.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, pain: Complaints in the uterus and region of the pelvis from straining and reaching up the arms; abortion from reaching up at the windows and fixing a curtain, etc.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, pain, sore, uterus: Aurum is a medicine that is suitable for induration of the uterus and ulceration of the uterus as a result of repeated abortions.
rubric_passages.Head: In Aurum the pain in the head is very intense, maddening, often accompanied by a sensation as if air were blowing upon him; he looks around to see where the draft comes from when there is none; extremely sensitive.
rubric_passages.Mind: So great in extent is this that one of the fundamental loves, which is the love of living, of self-protection, is perverted and he loathes life, is weary of life, longs to die and seeks methods to commit suicide.
rubric_passages.Mind, irritability: His business is dark, his family troubles him, his friends annoy him; he becomes extremely irritable, easily angered, is worried over trifles, and easily excited. Every little thing rouses him into anger and turmoil, he is always in a vexation.
rubric_passages.Mouth: Carious teeth. Toothache at night. Foul breath. Syphilitic ulcers in palate and throat. Boring in hard palate.
rubric_passages.Respiration: The symptoms of asthma and of difficult breathing you would naturally expect to be associated with the cardiac affections.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: The pains are violent, they tear, the bones ache as if they would break, not in acute fevers but in old syphilitic bone troubles. Knife-like pains in the periosteum. Pains in the joints rendering them immovable.
rubric_passages.Generalities, side: Little knobs on the nose composed of varicose veins in heart cases, with disturbance of the right side of the heart; sometimes found in old drinkers and in heart affections generally.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, pain, sore: Aurum is a medicine that is suitable for induration of the uterus and ulceration of the uterus as a result of repeated abortions.
rubric_passages.Head, congestion: The head is sore and feels bruised. Stitching, burning, tearing pains in the head; much throbbing in the head. The face is bloated, flushed and shiny with the congestive headaches.
rubric_passages.Appetite: This medicine has cured craving for alcohol, the craving of drunkards.

profile.personality: A deeply melancholic, restless individual who is extremely irritable and impossible to please. They are full of whims and notions, mentally and physically restless, preferring to walk slowly in open air rather than remain indoors where they feel worse.
profile.mental_state: The mind dwells obsessively on broken health, leading to low spirits and a suicidal disposition with loathing of life. Thinking about their complaints causes palpitation, and symptoms worsen after fright, vexation, and mortification. They are hypersensitive to noise, startle easily when spoken to, and experience constant fretting with aversion to occupation.
profile.emotional_pattern: Profound despondency and weeping characterize the emotional landscape, with a deep desire for death born from despair over their condition. Extreme anxiety is bound tightly to cardiac symptoms, creating a cycle of emotional distress and physical palpitation. There is marked indolence and emotional withdrawal, with tormenting dreams of sadness disrupting sleep.

rubric_passages.Chest: Suffocation in a warm room. from the clothing, from ascending stairs and from walking fast. Dyspnoea at night. Dry paroxysmal cough at night. Heart cough. Loose cough with thick yellow expectoration.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, palpitation: Palpitation from exertion and from excitement. Palpitation if suddenly spoken to. The palpitation keeps her from sleeping. Palpitation from mental exertion.
rubric_passages.Generalities: This remedy exercises a profound action upon the mind and body. The patients suffering from latent syphilis are over-sensitive to it, and often require it in their complaints. It has many bone symptoms and pains and they are worse at night.
rubric_passages.Mind: The mental symptoms are largely such as are found in Aurum. It has the same suicidal disposition. His mind dwells upon his broken health until he becomes low-spirited and desires death. He loathes his life. Weeping and aversion to his occupation. Indolence. The melancholia of old syphilitics. Extremely anxious with palpitation.
rubric_passages.Mouth: It has been useful in cancer of the tongue. Inflammation of the tongue followed by induration. Dry, red, excoriated tongue. Warts on the tongue. Metallic taste and salivation.
rubric_passages.Rectum: Haemorrhoids with bleeding at stool. A heavy ring of warts around the anus with copious moisture. Marked excoriation around the anus. It has cured fistula in ano. Fig warts of the anus with ulceration.
rubric_passages.Skin: Deep cracks about the wings of the nose. Lupus of the wings of the nose. Acne on the face. Eczema behind the ears.
rubric_passages.Clinical: It is a most useful remedy in patients suffering from the chronic effects of gonorrhoea and syphilis, where fig warts and syphilitic ulceration are present together.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, heart: Pain in the heart. Drawing and cutting in the heart. Violent pressure in the region of the heart. Cardiac anguish. Angina pectoris. Endocarditis. Enlarged right side of the heart.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation: It has cured rheumatic fever where the joints have been mostly affected but are now better and the heart is the principal seat of suffering. Many complaints are associated with cardiac disease.
rubric_passages.Chest, pain: Most distressing pressure under the sternum as if it would burst on walking fast ascending steps or on any exertion, with palpitation. Sharp pains in the chest, going from place to place.
rubric_passages.Mind, sadness, mental depression: His mind dwells upon his broken health until he becomes low-spirited and desires death. He loathes his life. Weeping and aversion to his occupation. Indolence. The melancholia of old syphilitics.
rubric_passages.Throat: Pains in the throat and ulceration. Ulceration of the tonsils. Inflammation with dryness in throat.
rubric_passages.Mind, sadness: His mind dwells upon his broken health until he becomes low-spirited and desires death. He loathes his life. Weeping and aversion to his occupation.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, pain: Pain in the heart. Drawing and cutting in the heart. Violent pressure in the region of the heart. Cardiac anguish.
rubric_passages.Chest, oppression: Most distressing pressure under the sternum as if it would burst on walking fast ascending steps or on any exertion, with palpitation.
rubric_passages.Genitalia male: Gonorrhoea in old syphilitic subjects where they have been badly treated. Chancre on the prepuce and scrotum. Fig warts on the penis, scrotum or anus. Bubo in left groin. Su ceased sexual desire Induration of testes.
rubric_passages.Urine: Frequent urination day and night, but worse during the night. Urine dribbles. Increased flow of urine. Urine turbid, reddish sediment.
rubric_passages.Urine, albuminous: Dropsical states from heart disease, from liver affections, with albumin in the urine after scarlet fever or with intermittent fever.
rubric_passages.Clinical, hemorrhage: Bleeding of the nose on blowing out of the crusts. Haemorrhoids with bleeding at stool.
rubric_passages.Mouth, ulcers: Pains in the throat and ulceration. Ulceration of the tonsils.
rubric_passages.Nose: It is one of the most useful remedies for catarrh of the nose in patients who are sensitive to the warm room. The discharges of the remedy are thin or thick like pus, very offensive and, sometimes bloody, and there are many hard crusts in the nose. Bleeding of the nose on blowing out of the crusts. Yellow, greenish discharge. It cures the most stubborn syphilitic catarrh.
rubric_passages.Skin, eruptions: Acne on the face. Eczema behind the ears. Deep cracks about the wings of the nose. Lupus of the wings of the nose.
rubric_passages.Clinical, ulcers: It is a most useful remedy in patients suffering from the chronic effects of gonorrhoea and syphilis, where fig warts and syphilitic ulceration are present together. Cancerous ulcer of the lips. Fig warts of the anus with ulceration.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, affections of, hear: Many complaints are associated with cardiac disease. Rheumatic heart. The heart is feeble. Violent, irregular heart.
rubric_passages.Chest, congestion (hyperemia of chest): Fullness of the veins all over the body is a strong feature of this remedy.
rubric_passages.Chest, fullness: Most distressing pressure under the sternum as if it would burst on walking fast ascending steps or on any exertion, with palpitation.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, fullness, heart: Fullness of the veins all over the body is a strong feature of this remedy.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, oppression, heart: Violent pressure in the region of the heart. Cardiac anguish.

profile.personality: A rapidly deteriorating type who presents with a besotted, intoxicated appearance even without alcohol use. The individual is characterized by sudden prostration and a tendency toward septic, zymotic states, going from functional to profoundly ill with startling speed.
profile.mental_state: Marked confusion and stupor dominate, with an inability to think clearly or complete thoughts — words trail off mid-sentence as the mind scatters. A striking delusion of duality pervades: the sensation of being broken into pieces, of body parts being separate entities arguing with each other, and a futile effort to gather the scattered parts back together.
profile.emotional_pattern: An anxious, frightened quality emerges when roused from stupor, as if waking from horrible dreams. The predominant state is one of dull indifference and withdrawal — preferring to curl up undisturbed like a dog — punctuated by restless agitation when the fragmented sense of self prevents sleep.

rubric_passages.Extremities: After the case has been running on a few days the limbs become helpless and tremulous.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Baptisia is suitable for acute diseases. It is principally a short-acting medicine, suitable for complaints that are not long lasting. So far as we know it is not an antipsoric, does not go deep into the life. All of its acute diseases and complaints have the appearance of Zymosis, like scarlet fever, diphtheria, typhoid, and gangrenous complaints. There is one thing that is unusual about it, it brings on this septic state more rapidly than most other remedies.
rubric_passages.Generalities, side, right: Great soreness in the right iliac fossa; so sore and tender, no bigger than a fist.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness, enervation: Exhaustion comes rapidly. In three days he has a deathly sinking coming over him.
rubric_passages.Mind: His mind seems to be gone. He does not know what he is talking about he is in confusion, and when aroused he attempts to say something, and utters a word or two and it all flits away, and he is back in his state of stupor again.
rubric_passages.Mind, restlessness, nervousness: There are stages when he is not quite so stupid, and he is sleepless and restless. That is the exception.
rubric_passages.Mouth: The tongue is swollen, painful, offensive. Covered with black blood. Raw; denuded. Stiff and dry as leather. Described as if it was made of wood, or burnt leather; ulcerated.
rubric_passages.Rectum: Foetid, exhausting diarrhoea. Aphthous diarrhoea which means that the parts of the anus that roll out are ulcerated, little aphthous patches inside of the margin.
rubric_passages.Sleep: Most of the time he is unconscious except when roused. Sometimes mutters. You will see his lips go, and you rouse him to see what he is about, and he is trying to get the pieces together.
rubric_passages.Sleep, sleepiness: Excessive drowsiness. Delirious stupor. Lies in a semi-comatose state.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, pain: Great soreness in the right iliac fossa; so sore and tender, no bigger than a fist.
rubric_passages.Generalities, side: Great soreness in the right iliac fossa; so sore and tender, no bigger than a fist.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness: Prostration increases. The jaw drops and he lies upon the back unconscious, with the mouth wide open. He gradually slides down toward the foot of the bed. A peculiar sort of paralytic weakness.
rubric_passages.Mind, restlessness: When the stupor is not so great he is restless and turns and tosses. In that case he cannot sleep, because he cannot get the pieces together.
rubric_passages.Clinical: Baptisia has been a very useful remedy in gangrenous sore mouth and sore throat.
rubric_passages.Abdomen: The abdomen is distended; the stomach is distended. We may have these symptoms in inflammation of the liver, when this remedy would be useful. Along with the diseases that I have mentioned, tympanitic abdomen.
rubric_passages.Face: Dark red with besotted appearance. Hot and perceptibly flushed; dusky.
rubric_passages.Mind, dullness, sluggishness, difficulty: Dullness, especially at night. Indisposition to think. Mind seems weak.
rubric_passages.Stool: Thin, faecal, watery, yellow. It has a typical typhoid discharge; the most typical typhoid stool is like yellow corn-meal mush, coming on many times a day, but soft, pappy, just about the consistency of soft mush.
rubric_passages.Throat: The throat takes on ulceration; is raw and bleeding. There may be diphtheritic exudations in the throat, but round about it there are those low, dark, offensive surfaces. The throat is greatly swollen, and it is with difficulty that he can swallow.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, distension: The abdomen becomes distended much earlier than in a regular typhoid; that is one who is accustomed to observing those things knows they are postponed for a number of days; while with this remedy the third day the abdomen is distended.
rubric_passages.Extremities, pain: The limbs become helpless and tremulous. The hand when it is raised is tremulous, and the limbs are tremulous. Quivering all over the body.

profile.personality: A deeply underdeveloped, childlike constitution marked by arrested mental and physical growth. The Baryta Carbonica type remains dependent, simple, and incapable of the self-direction expected for their age, whether appearing as a child who cannot learn or an adult who has regressed into premature old age and second childhood.
profile.mental_state: Intellectual dwarfishness with inability to comprehend, memorize, or maintain thoughts, leading progressively toward imbecility. There is a persistent want of clear consciousness, a cloudiness of intellect, and a failure to form perceptions or take in new information despite repeated instruction.
profile.emotional_pattern: Intensely bashful, timid, and easily frightened, with a strong tendency to hide from strangers and shrink from exposure. Constantly borrowing trouble with imaginary cares and worries, always anticipating that something bad will happen, and prone to a chronic whining mood that worsens the more attention is given to complaints.

rubric_passages.Back: Tension in the muscles of the back. Swelling of the glands of the back of the neck. Swelling of the cervical glands. Fatty tumors upon the back.
rubric_passages.Back, pain: Tension in the muscles of the back.
rubric_passages.Chest: Chest full of mucus, but unable to expectorate it. You observe from the effort made in the cough that there is a weakness somewhere, a lack of power. It is not a strong effort.
rubric_passages.Chill: The patient himself is chilly; sensitive to cold; wants to be well wrapped.
rubric_passages.Extremities: The pains are of a gouty, rheumatic character, worse from becoming cold and from cold weather. Paralytic weakness and trembling and numbness of the feet. Offensive perspiration of the feet which causes soreness of the soles, ulcers on the feet, checked foot sweat. Trembling of the feet while standing and tottering while walking. Tearing, drawing pains in lower limbs. Sudden sharp pains in knees.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Baryta carbonica is an interesting study, because it is fully proved and a constitutional remedy. Such remedies are always more interesting than the short-acting, superficial ones. They take hold in deep-seated, long-lasting, miasmatic troubles.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness, enervation: Marked weakness with feeble pulse is a strong feature and he must lie down; he is worse standing and sitting. The weakness is worse after eating.
rubric_passages.Head: Pressing headaches. Headaches ameliorated in fresh air, in the open air, and aggravated from heat. That is the opposite of its general state. The Baryta carb. general state is aggravated from cold; he is sensitive to cold, and his complaints come on from becoming cold; but his headaches are ameliorated in cool air.
rubric_passages.Mind: The Baryta carb. child will be seen hiding behind the furniture when strangers come in; will hide as for shame of something or as if afraid. It imagines all sorts of strange things, that it is talked about, or laughed at.
rubric_passages.Mouth: Paralysis of the tongue in old people. Weakness of the tongue in old people. Hardness of the tongue in old people.
