rubric_passages.Rectum: Baryta carb. has an inveterate constipation. Difficult knotty stools. Stool hard, and insufficient. A lack of action in the rectum, and hemorrhoidal protrusion during stool and urination.
rubric_passages.Rectum, pain: hemorrhoidal protrusion during stool and urination.
rubric_passages.Skin: So this remedy cures tumors and warts. Warts upon the limbs, and upon the back, and upon the hands.
rubric_passages.Stomach: There is weakness of digestion, all sorts of disorders and disagreeable sensations in the stomach after eating. Sometimes gastralgia; sometimes distension. Stomach aches after eating. Extreme weakness after eating.
rubric_passages.Stomach, pain: Sometimes gastralgia; sometimes distension. Stomach aches after eating.
rubric_passages.Clinical, paralysis: It has some of the paralytic conditions analogous to the complaints in old apoplectics, and it has been very useful in re-establishing the supply and flow of nerve force along the nerves. It parallels Phos., and is an excellent remedy for old paralytic conditions that have come from a rupture of a blood vessel, and therefore pressure upon the nerve supply.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pressure: Pressure in the brain. Pressing headaches.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness: Marked weakness with feeble pulse is a strong feature and he must lie down; he is worse standing and sitting. The weakness is worse after eating.
rubric_passages.Appetite: The troubles of eating and drinking and appetite and stomach can all be run together.
rubric_passages.Clinical: Baryta carb. has cured fatty tumors, encysted tumors, lupus, outward growths of tuberculous character, sarcoma; and it has mitigated the pains and sufferings and has prolonged life in cancerous affections.
rubric_passages.Back, dorsal region, back, left, right: Fatty tumors upon the back. Swelling of the glands of the back of the neck.

profile.personality: A deeply withdrawn, slow-developing constitutional type marked by progressive mental and physical decline. These individuals appear dull, timid, and cowardly, preferring to sit alone in corners rather than engage with the world, with a fundamental inability to keep pace with normal life demands.
profile.mental_state: Profound mental weakness ranging from slowness in learning to complete imbecility and insanity, with great difficulty concentrating and a persistent dullness of mind. The surroundings feel strange and transformed, with delusions and confusion dominating the mental landscape. Children are notably slow to learn or understand, giving confused answers when questioned.
profile.emotional_pattern: A core pattern of fearfulness, sadness, and irritability, with marked anxiety about the future and a pervasive dread of evil and of other people. The emotional life is dominated by two extremes: silent, apathetic withdrawal with morning sadness, and episodes of uncontrollable erotic excitement that can escalate into frank insanity. Easily angered yet fundamentally irresolute, they oscillate between passive indifference and agitated disturbance.

rubric_passages.Abdomen, hard: Enlarged and bard liver and mesenteric glands. Flatulence; fullness; hard abdomen.
rubric_passages.Bladder: Inflammation of the bladder. Retention of urine. Urging to urination; constant, frequent, ineffectual, violent.
rubric_passages.Chest: It has cured phtisical conditions of the chest with herpetic eruptions and indurated testes.
rubric_passages.Generalities: This is one of our deep acting constitutional remedies and one much neglected. It was much used by the earlier men in our school with great effect. In mental weakness, insanity, enlarged glands and sexual excitement we have a group of symptoms hard to cure without Baryta muriatica.
rubric_passages.Mind: Easily angered. Anxiety in the evening; about the future; with nausea; retching and pressure in the stomach. It is useful ill children who are slow to learn or understand; children do not desire to play like other children.
rubric_passages.Mouth: Bleeding gums. Cracked tongue; white tongue. Dryness of the mouth in the morning, of the tongue; coated tongue; viscid mucus fills the mouth and covers the tongue; odor from mouth offensive; putrid; like from mercury. Burning in the mouth; the gums are sore.
rubric_passages.Mouth, dryness: Dryness of the mouth in the morning, of the tongue.
rubric_passages.Rectum: External piles, protrude during urination; itching of the anus; involuntary stool; moisture about the anus; some pain in the rectum during stool burning during and after stool; pressing pain; soreness, stitching tenesmus. Paralysis of the rectum and of the sphincter ani.
rubric_passages.Rectum, constipation: Constipation; difficult stool; no desire for stool; stool hard and covered with mucus; generally painless.
rubric_passages.Rectum, pain: some pain in the rectum during stool burning during and after stool; pressing pain; soreness, stitching tenesmus.
rubric_passages.Respiration: Respiration is fact, anxious, asthmatic, deep, difficult, with cough, and she must sit up; rattling, short.
rubric_passages.Skin: Dryness, biting and burning in skin; cold skin; eruptions; eczema herpes all over body; pimples; scabs, yellow scales; stinging, urticaria; erysipelas, formication, horripilation. Inflammation of skin. Itching. Swelling and tension. Whole body covered with small ulcers. Unhealthy skin. Burning ulcers.
rubric_passages.Stomach: He can eat only the simplest food, as digestion is slow and the stomach is feeble; inflammation of the stomach; loathing of food; nausea. Pain in the stomach; cramping; pressing after eating; sore; stitching.
rubric_passages.Clinical: It has cured most stubborn cases of epilepsy.
rubric_passages.Abdomen: Distension of the abdomen. Enlarged and bard liver and mesenteric glands. Flatulence; fullness; hard abdomen. Pain in abdomen in the morning, after eating, before stool, in hypochondria, burning, cramping, cutting, stitching in hypochondria and inguinal region.
rubric_passages.Ear: Abscesses behind both ears; discharge from both ears; copious offensive; like spoiled cheese; purulent; after scarlet fever. Eruptions on ears; recurrent inflammation of the ear.
rubric_passages.Face: The face is red with fever, otherwise pale. Drawing and spasms of the face. Dryness of the lips. Enlarged and indurated submaxillary gland with otorrhoea; eruption on forehead and nose; crusty, pimples, expression is anxious and the face is hot.
rubric_passages.Mind, dullness, sluggishness, difficulty: Concentration impossible. The locality around him seems strange, transformed; timid and cowardly; delusion that he walks on his knees. Dullness of mind.
rubric_passages.Stomach, indigestion (includes complaint: He can eat only the simplest food, as digestion is slow and the stomach is feeble.
rubric_passages.Throat: Inflammation of the throat and tonsils; recurrent tonsillitis from taking cold; dryness in throat. Enlarged tonsils elongation of the uvula with sore throat; viscid mucus in the throat pain in the throat and ear, worse on right side; with salivation; worse on swallowing; burning in the throat.
rubric_passages.Ear, discharges: discharge from both ears; copious offensive; like spoiled cheese; purulent; after scarlet fever.
rubric_passages.Eye: Agglutination of the lids in the morning; discharge of mucus and pus from the eyes; inflammation of the eyes in scrofulous patients. Itching and smarting, pressing pain in eyes; paralysis of upper lids; photophobia; pupils dilated and immovable.
rubric_passages.Eye, redness: Redness of the eyes; of the lids; veins injected.
rubric_passages.Clinical, convulsions: convulsions with headache, deafness, vomiting and burning in the stomach; convulsions with full consciousness with electric shocks; clonic spasms.
rubric_passages.Clinical, convulsions, epileptic: It has cured most stubborn cases of epilepsy.
rubric_passages.Genitalia male: Enlarged testes. Induration of testes Inflammation of testes from suppressed gonorrhoea; seminal emission sexual passion greatly increased, even violent.
rubric_passages.Mind, insanity: Insanity where the sexual excitement becomes strong. Irresolution. Irritable in the evening. Mania in every form when sexual desire is increased; nymphomania.

profile.personality: Plethoric, vigorous, and intellectual individuals with strong constitutions. These are brainy, robust people who are highly reactive and sensitive to all impressions, possessing an intensified sensorium that makes them acutely aware of their environment.
profile.mental_state: The mind is characterized by extreme excitability, violence, and active delirium rather than passive states. Full of vivid imaginations, hallucinations of ghosts and monsters, and destructive impulses including striking, biting, and attempts to escape. Alternates between states of wild mania with insane laughter and periods of profound stupor with loss of memory and consciousness.
profile.emotional_pattern: Dominated by great anxiety, intense fear of imaginary things, and an overwhelming desire to flee. The emotional state is never passive but always violent and sudden in onset, with extreme irritability and hypersensitivity to all stimuli including noise, light, touch, and the presence of others. Emotions intensify rapidly and can shift abruptly from furious rage to terrified shrieking.

rubric_passages.Bladder: No remedy has a greater irritation in the bladder and along the urinary tract than Bell. The urging to urinate is constant. The urine dribbles, and it burns intensely along the whole length of the urethra. The whole urinary tract is in a state of irritation. Bell. has cured inflammation of the bladder. With the irritation and the congestion there is all the sensitiveness to pressure we find in any other part where Bell. is indicated; sensitive to a jar.
rubric_passages.Bladder, urination, frequent: The urging is violent and sudden. When a little urine has collected in the bladder he has a sudden, painful urging.
rubric_passages.Chest: Tightness in the chest, Painfulness in the chest. Soreness in the chest. In Bell. the child will cry the instant it feels that urging to cough, because it knows what a great suffering is going to take place. The chest is so painful, the child dreads the cough and screams. There is burning in the chest; violent congestion in the chest.
rubric_passages.Chill: Cold feet, cold hands; hot head. It seems all the blood is being hurried to the head. Cold extremities with hot head.
rubric_passages.Extremities: In all the muscles in the limbs, and throughout the body, convulsions. Children go into convulsions with head troubles, with congestion of the brain, with irritation of the brain. Convulsions from taking cold, in plethoric children, and the limbs are most likely to show forth these convulsive efforts of the muscles. Violent cramping. All the limbs are in a state of convulsive movements.
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness: Rush of blood to the head. Cold extremities. Cold feet, cold hands; hot head.
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness, hands: During all this time the feet are cold. Head hot, feet cold, or feet and hands cold as ice. It seems all the blood is being hurried to the head.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Belladonna is a remedy that takes hold of the system with great violence. It is especially suitable to plethoric, vigorous individual, and intellectual people brainy people have complaints coming on suddenly, providing they are in a substantial state of health, and are reasonably plethoric and vascular. The complaints of Belladonna come on suddenly, run a regular course, and subside suddenly.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain, burning, internally: Another grand feature of Bell. is present in its inflamed parts, and in its painful parts, whenever Bell. brings out anything like a decided action, it has burning; intense burning. The burning in the throat with a Bell. sore throat is like a coal of fire. Inflammation of the tonsils, burning like fire. The skin burns, and it is burning hot to the sensation of the patient, and intensely hot to the doctor.
rubric_passages.Generalities, side, right: Belladonna acts in many instances on the right side. It is common for the right ovary to be more painful than the left, or the right to be entirely affected and the left not at all, in Belladonna. So it is with the right side of the throat. So it is sometimes in the right side of the body.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: In the male genitals we have scarcely any important symptoms; but with the female there are many, and some very distressing ones. They have symptoms of great suffering, of great excitability, The parts are sensitive; the uterus and ovaries are congested, sore to touch, sensitive to jar. Irritable uterus, until it has become enlarged and painful, and sore to the touch.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, pain: Pains in the ovaries with the appearance of the menses. Pains in the pelvic region, which come on suddenly, and cease as suddenly.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, pain, sore, uterus: The uterus and ovaries are congested, sore to touch, sensitive to jar. Irritable uterus, until it has become enlarged and painful, and sore to the touch. Sometimes it remains in this state after parturition. Or, after every menstrual period it is a little larger, and remains. It does not return to its normal state, but remains congested, and the woman feels all through the interim as if she was menstruating. Bruised feeling; sensitive to a jar.
rubric_passages.Head: This sensitivity is present in most of the Bell. headaches. There are stabbing pains, throbbing pains, shooting pains, all in connection with congestion. They are all sensitive to motion, to every jar, to light, even to the winking of the eyes; sensitive to draft.
rubric_passages.Mind: The mental symptoms of Bell. are delightful to study, but dreadful to look upon. The mental symptoms are such as come on in intense fevers, such as are observed in maniacal excitement, in delirium. Excitement runs all through. Violence runs all through the mental symptoms. The mental symptoms are all active, never passive. There is no passive delirium in Bell. It is a wild state. He is wild; striking, biting, tearing things; doing unusual things; doing strange things; doing unexpected things.
rubric_passages.Mind, irritability: It may have been gleaned that Bell. is a remedy that is over sensitive; a state of hyperesthesia extreme irritability of tissues. This is said to be an increased irritability of the nerve centres. This develops a state of increased ability to taste, and to smell and to feel; excibility of the sensorium. Excessive nervous irritability stands out, perhaps, as one of the most prominent features of Bell.
rubric_passages.Mind, restlessness, nervousness: Great anxiety runs through the remedy. The patient is in great excitement; the circulation is in a state of great excitement; the heart is in great excitement; motion and emotion increase the beating of the heart.
rubric_passages.Mouth: Dry mouth; dry tongue; swollen tongue; protruding tongue, dry and hard, feels like leather. Loss of sensation, loss of taste, loss of power of the tongue and loss of speech are all Bell. features.
rubric_passages.Mouth, dryness: Great dryness; a sensation of dryness. Dryness in the nose; mouth; of the tongue; in the throat; in the chest, and such evidences as dry cough and spasmodic conditions. Dryness of the mouth, with thirst. Dryness of the mouth, with no thirst.
rubric_passages.Rectum: Belladonna has dysenteric troubles. Diarrhoea, with scanty fluid stool; marked straining, but with it the face is flushed. Heat, redness and burning in the face and head. Cold extremities, with hot head. Much straining, but passes scanty stool. Spasmodic constriction of sphincter ani; with hemorrhoids.
rubric_passages.Rectum, pain: Hemorrhoids that are violently painful, that are intensely red, that are greatly swollen and inflamed, a high grade of inflammation; cannot be touched; must lie with limbs wide apart, the hemorrhoids are painful and there is much burning.
rubric_passages.Respiration: His respiration is short, rapid and painful. Often asthmatic. Asthmatic condition, with spasmodic breathing.
rubric_passages.Skin: The heat, the redness and the burning characterize most of the skin symptoms. It has a fine rash; not the coarse rash, but the fine, scarlet red, smooth rash. It has inflammation of the skin, phlegmonous, a deep inflammation. First bright red, gradually grows bluish or purple, or mottled; and in this there is the heat, redness and burning.
rubric_passages.Sleep: Its sleep is a congestive sleep, a stupor; full of dreams full of violence. Wakes with fright from a horrible dream, a nightmare. Jerks and twitches in sleep.
rubric_passages.Sleep, restless: Restless sleep. Moaning and groaning in sleep. Doing all sorts of violence. Delirium in sleep. Restless tossing in sleep.
rubric_passages.Sleep, sleepiness: Apparently in a dream, and he screams out. Dreams horrible things. In Bell. the infant also commonly remains in a profound stupor, the profound stupor that goes with congestion of the brain pupils dilated; skin hot and dry; face red, throbbing carotids.
rubric_passages.Stomach: In the stomach and bowels we have inflammatory conditions which can all be grouped as one. Pain, burning, distress, distension; sensitive to a jar, and to the slightest motion, and to the slightest pressure. Sensitive to a jar, and sensitive to motion. Pain in the stomach extending through to the spine. Inflammation of the stomach from becoming chilled, with intense heat; with much burning.
